news.title: SPX Technologies: Data Center Part Of The Business Is Attractive
news.text: SPX Technologies is rated a buy as its data center cooling segment becomes a significant growth driver, supported by expanding capacity. SPXC's Olympus Max product demonstrates strong traction, with $50M in 2025 bookings and multi-year demand commitments from key customers. Data center revenue is projected to grow 50% annually, reaching ~13% of total sales in 2026 and potentially exceeding 30% within four years.
